ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_ascii" TEXT /* ASCII name of the city (e.g., no special characters) */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the city is located */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county where the city is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city (if available) */,
  "population_proper" INTEGER /* Proper population of the city (if available) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the city (if available) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the city data (e.g., polygon, point) */,
  "incorporated" INTEGER /* Whether the city is incorporated (True or False) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city (if available) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Predominant climate type of the city */,
  "closest_large_city" TEXT /* Name of the nearest large city */,
  "distance_to_closest_large_city" REAL /* Distance to the nearest large city in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the city */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* List of data sources used for the city data */,
  "user_ratings" REAL /* User-generated ratings for the city */,
  "user_reviews" TEXT /* User-generated reviews for the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Washington, California) */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "state_timezones" TEXT /* List of timezones within the state */,
  "state_climate_types" TEXT /* List of predominant climate types within the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county (FIPS code) */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "county_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "county_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the county */,
  "county_climate_type" TEXT /* Predominant climate type of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_fetched" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data fetch from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_sources" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the cities table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_data_sources" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the states table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_data_sources" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the counties table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the cities table */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* User review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
